hero.title: Christian Miguel S. Licudan
hero.description: Building modern, aesthetic, and high-performance applications.
about.text: I am a passionate developer with a keen eye for design and a strong foundation in software engineering. I specialize in creating intuitive and visually stunning user experiences while ensuring robust backend performance. I thrive in dynamic environments where I can tackle complex problems and deliver innovative solutions.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Led the development of a highly scalable web application using modern JavaScript frameworks. Improved performance by 40% and mentored junior developers.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Designed and implemented RESTful APIs, built responsive UI components, and managed database migrations.

projects.title: Cyber Dashboard
projects.description: A futuristic analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization.

projects.title: Neon E-Commerce
projects.description: A high-performance e-commerce platform with a dark mode aesthetic.
